_purpose: Capability inventory for QA Path B preflight. Skill runs preflight-check.sh BEFORE Workflow launch. Missing capability => abort with structured error => 0 tokens.
_doc_ref: ORCHESTRATION-MIGRATION-PLAN.md §1.10 + §B + §1.11 corrections (2026-05-28 r2 incl. reviewer round R1-R15 + D1-D4 lock); QA-PHASE-B-BLUEPRINT.md §7 + §22 + §23

qa-risk-classifier.role: Risk classification (Impact x Likelihood + Floor Rules) + QA layer selection. Invoked by Skill main thread BEFORE preview (per R4 Option A) AND as Workflow first phase LayerSelect.

qa-evidence-validator.role: Evidence bundle validation + release decision + persistence via qa-sdk. EvidenceBundle node executor.

qa-flaky-triager._required_when: mode in {release-readiness, commercial-cert} AND flaky_signal present
qa-flaky-triager.role: 8-category flaky classification + accountable quarantine + critical-path refusal. FlakyTriage node executor.

e2e-runner.role: Playwright / Vercel Agent Browser E2E scenario execution + artifact capture. E2E pipeline stage executor.

code-reviewer._required_when: internal harness presets (smoke / graph-smoke) only — production modes route to dedicated runners (qa-*-runner) after R2 roadmap completion 2026-05-29.
code-reviewer.role: Multi-purpose execute-and-persist fallback (preloads relevant skill contract via prompt). RETAINED for internal harness smoke/graph-smoke presets where dedicated runner overhead is not justified.
code-reviewer._d1_lock_note: D1 short-term reuse retired by B.1.f (2026-05-29). Production modes (quick-check / focused-qa-gate / release-readiness / commercial-cert) now dispatch to dedicated runners: qa-static-baseline-runner / qa-component-runner / qa-contract-runner / qa-visual-runner / qa-a11y-runner / qa-perf-runner. code-reviewer remains registered for internal harness presets only.

qa-static-baseline-runner._required_when: Static layer in selected_layers AND mode in {quick-check, focused-qa-gate, release-readiness, commercial-cert}
qa-static-baseline-runner.role: Static Baseline execution worker — runs tsc + ESLint + Prettier + npm audit + git-secrets + OpenAPI lint. Emits STATIC_BASELINE_SCHEMA.v1 with command_evidence[] mandatory. Replaces code-reviewer D1 reuse for StaticBaseline phase.

qa-component-runner._required_when: Component layer in selected_layers AND mode in {quick-check, focused-qa-gate, release-readiness, commercial-cert}
qa-component-runner.role: Component-behavior execution worker (per-surface dispatch). Runs existing Vitest / Jest / RTL / Cypress component / Storybook test-runner. Emits COMPONENT_TEST_SCHEMA.v1.

qa-contract-runner._required_when: Contract layer in selected_layers AND mode in {focused-qa-gate, release-readiness, commercial-cert}
qa-contract-runner.role: Contract-API execution worker (per-contract dispatch). Runs openapi-cli / spectral / graphql-inspector / pact verify / asyncapi diff / buf breaking. Emits CONTRACT_TEST_SCHEMA.v1 with breaking_changes accurate count.

qa-visual-runner._required_when: Visual layer in selected_layers AND mode == commercial-cert
qa-visual-runner.role: Visual-regression execution worker (per-surface × viewport × theme dispatch). Runs Playwright toHaveScreenshot / Storybook visual / Chromatic CLI. Emits VISUAL_AUDIT_SCHEMA.v1 with decision_hint (deterministic VisualGate makes final).

qa-a11y-runner._required_when: A11y layer in selected_layers AND mode == commercial-cert
qa-a11y-runner.role: Accessibility execution worker. Runs axe-core / Lighthouse a11y / pa11y / playwright-axe. Emits A11Y_AUDIT_SCHEMA.v1 with decision_hint (deterministic A11yGate makes final).

qa-perf-runner._required_when: Perf layer in selected_layers AND mode == commercial-cert
qa-perf-runner.role: Performance-reliability execution worker. Runs Lighthouse CI / playwright-perf / k6 / bundle-analyzer / web-vitals. Emits PERF_AUDIT_SCHEMA.v1 with decision_hint (deterministic PerfGate makes final).

tdd-guide._required_when: mode == release-readiness AND Unit-TDD layer in selected_layers
tdd-guide.role: TDD bridge — generates / runs unit tests for newly-added critical functions.

skills._note: Loadable SKILL.md packages. Per D3 lock: embedded contracts live in embedded_skill_contracts below, NOT here. Currently no QA narrow skill ships as standalone ~/.claude/skills/qa-*/SKILL.md.

embedded_skill_contracts._note: Per D3 lock + R3 reviewer correction — contracts referenced by anchor in parent SKILL.md, NOT separate files. Preflight verifies anchor existence via grep (resolve-capabilities.js resolve-embedded-skill-contracts). All anchors live in enterprise-qa-testing/SKILL.md children: block AND/OR body headings.

_doc_hook_classes._purpose: §1.11 correction #8 + reviewer R12 — quick-check mode should not require every safety hook installed; release-readiness / commercial-cert must.
_doc_hook_classes.launch_gate: Always block. Without it the entire safety contract breaks. Example: qa-preview-gate.
_doc_hook_classes.safety_guard: Block in {release-readiness, commercial-cert}; warn elsewhere. Example: qa-block-update-snapshots, qa-detect-internal-mock.
_doc_hook_classes.evidence_quality: Warn in {quick-check, focused-qa-gate}; block in {release-readiness, commercial-cert}. Example: qa-evidence-required, qa-quarantine-accountability, qa-floor-rule-prompt.

governed-gate-workflow-guard.required_when: always (NO-OP unless cwd is a governed .appsec/.qa project)
governed-gate-workflow-guard._purpose: Blocks inline model-authored Workflow `script` (Dynamic Workflow / ultracode auto-orchestration) when a QA gate is active; allows deterministic qa-orchestrator scriptPath/name launches. Closes the hole qa-preview-gate leaves: inline scripts have no name/scriptPath so the preview-gate waves them through. governed_gate_mode in .qa/config.json: off|active-gate|always (default active-gate).

qa-quarantine-accountability._note: Gates git commit only — always block when triggered regardless of mode.

qa-evidence-required._runtime_guard: Reviewer R11 — replaces unreliable QA_WORKFLOW_RUNNING env guard. Skill main thread writes <project>/.qa/state/running/<run_id>.json BEFORE Workflow launch; removes after EvidenceBundle persistence completes. Hook reads sentinel — if present + atime within 30 min, skips 'missing bundle' block.

qa-sdk._workflow_state_layer_note: D4 lock + R10 wording-discipline — qa-sdk evidence.append <tag> workflow-state accepts arbitrary safe-name layer. workflow-state.yaml is a Skill-level provenance / planning snapshot (Option B single-file accumulator), NOT Workflow native cross-session resume cache. Native resume is same-session only. Document this in enterprise-qa-testing SKILL.md §17 during B.1.e.

spec_hash_inputs: phases (refs only — prompt_ref / schema_ref / agentType / model_alias / resolved_model / op / stall_ms)
node_fingerprint_inputs: sha256(concat embedded_skill_contracts referenced by this node)
node-specific upstream ctx (RawAudit changed_files_hash; E2E branch_sha + viewport + baseline_dir_hash; Component surface_path_hash)
